# Research Peptides EU
> Premium research-grade peptides and compounds for European laboratories.

Research Peptides EU is a leading EU-based supplier helping European researchers, clinical laboratories, and biotech analysts achieve precise, reliable results with high-purity third-party tested peptides.

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage — overview of our quality guarantees and top products
- /shop: Full catalog of research peptides
- /peptide-guide: Comprehensive guide on handling, storage, and reconstitution
- /peptide-calculator: Tool for calculating peptide reconstitution dosages
- /faq: Frequently Asked Questions

## Primary Topics
- High-purity research peptides
- Lyophilized peptide reconstitution and storage
- Third-party lab testing and Certificates of Analysis (COAs)
- EU cold-chain peptide logistics
